description_zh: 基於 XMTP 加密傳輸的 A2A 代理程式到代理協定。
original_description: A2A agent-to-agent protocol over XMTP encrypted transport.

title: resume-and-cover-letter
description: Generate ATS-optimized resumes and tailored cover letters matched to specific job descriptions.
description_zh: 產生 ATS 優化的履歷表和與特定職位描述相符的客製化求職信。
original_description: Generate ATS-optimized resumes and tailored cover letters matched to specific job descriptions.

title: runtime-attestation-probe
description: Helps validate that agent behavior at runtime matches the capabilities and constraints declared in its attestation.
description_zh: 幫助驗證運行時的代理行為是否與其證明中聲明的功能和約束相符。
original_description: Helps validate that agent behavior at runtime matches the capabilities and constraints declared in its attestation.

title: sholat
description: Ambil jadwal sholat (imsak, subuh, dzuhur, ashar, maghrib, isya) untuk kota/kabupaten di Indonesia dari API Muslim.
description_zh: Ambil jadwal sholat（imsak、subuh、dzuhur、ashar、maghrib、isya）是印尼達裡 API 穆斯林的 kota/kabupaten。
original_description: Ambil jadwal sholat (imsak, subuh, dzuhur, ashar, maghrib, isya) untuk kota/kabupaten di Indonesia dari API Muslim.

title: signet-guardian
description: Payment guard middleware for AI agents.
description_zh: 人工智慧代理的支付保護中間件。
original_description: Payment guard middleware for AI agents.

title: stripe
description: Easy-to-use agentic wallets powered by Stripe.
description_zh: 由 Stripe 提供支援的易於使用的代理錢包。
original_description: Easy-to-use agentic wallets powered by Stripe.

title: stripe-best-practices
description: Best practices for building Stripe payment integrations.
description_zh: 建構 Stripe 支付整合的最佳實務。
original_description: Best practices for building Stripe payment integrations.

title: synth-data
description: Query volatility forecasts from Synthdata.co for crypto, commodities, and stocks.
description_zh: 從 Synthdata.co 查詢加密貨幣、商品和股票的波動性預測。
original_description: Query volatility forecasts from Synthdata.co for crypto, commodities, and stocks.

title: talkspresso
description: Manage a Talkspresso business (services, appointments, products, clients, earnings, calendar) using the Talkspresso.
description_zh: 使用 Talkspresso 管理 Talkspresso 業務（服務、約會、產品、客戶、收入、行事曆）。
original_description: Manage a Talkspresso business (services, appointments, products, clients, earnings, calendar) using the Talkspresso.

title: tech-security-audit
description: This skill integrates Nmap scanning functionality to perform local network vulnerability assessments.
description_zh: 該技能整合了 Nmap 掃描功能來執行本地網路漏洞評估。
original_description: This skill integrates Nmap scanning functionality to perform local network vulnerability assessments.

title: tfl
description: London TfL transit — real-time Tube arrivals, bus predictions, line status, service disruptions, journey planning.
description_zh: 倫敦 TfL 交通 — 即時地鐵到達、公車預測、線路狀態、服務中斷、旅程規劃。
original_description: London TfL transit — real-time Tube arrivals, bus predictions, line status, service disruptions, journey planning.

title: tixflow
description: AI-powered event assistant for discovering, booking, and coordinating event tickets.
description_zh: 由人工智慧驅動的活動助手，用於發現、預訂和協調活動門票。
original_description: AI-powered event assistant for discovering, booking, and coordinating event tickets.

title: tixflow-v2
description: AI-powered event assistant for discovering, booking, and coordinating event tickets.
description_zh: 由人工智慧驅動的活動助手，用於發現、預訂和協調活動門票。
original_description: AI-powered event assistant for discovering, booking, and coordinating event tickets.

title: track-flight
description: Track flights in real-time with detailed status, gate info, delays, and live position.
description_zh: 即時追蹤航班的詳細狀態、登機口資訊、延誤和即時位置。
original_description: Track flights in real-time with detailed status, gate info, delays, and live position.

title: translink-cli
description: Query, troubleshoot, and explain Translink SEQ GTFS static + realtime data using local translink_* commands.
description_zh: 使用本地 translink 命令查詢、排除故障並解釋 Translink SEQ GTFS 靜態 + 即時資料。
original_description: Query, troubleshoot, and explain Translink SEQ GTFS static + realtime data using local translink_* commands.

title: travel-agent
description: Find, book, and change flights for your human via email.
description_zh: 透過電子郵件為您的人員尋找、預訂和更改航班。
original_description: Find, book, and change flights for your human via email.

title: trip-protocol
description: Psychedelic NFTs on Monad that temporarily rewrite your agent's SOUL.md.
description_zh: Monad 上的迷幻 NFT 會暫時重寫您代理程式的 SOUL.md。
original_description: Psychedelic NFTs on Monad that temporarily rewrite your agent's SOUL.md.

title: ubtrippin
description: Manages travel for your user via UBTRIPPIN — reads trips, items, and booking details.
description_zh: 透過 UBTRIPPIN 為您的使用者管理旅行 — 讀取旅行、專案和預訂詳細資訊。
original_description: Manages travel for your user via UBTRIPPIN — reads trips, items, and booking details.

title: usc-booking-api
description: Scannt deine Urban Sports Club Venues, zeigt Kurse mit direkten Booking-Links und kann Kurse buchen und stornieren.
original_description: Scannt deine Urban Sports Club Venues, zeigt Kurse mit direkten Booking-Links und kann Kurse buchen und stornieren.

title: void-atlas-protocol
description: Void Atlas Protocol – a four-axis ethical navigation map (power, truth, sovereignty, care) with waypoints, routes.
description_zh: 虛空地圖集協議 – 帶有航點、路線的四軸道德導航地圖（權力、真理、主權、關懷）。
original_description: Void Atlas Protocol – a four-axis ethical navigation map (power, truth, sovereignty, care) with waypoints, routes.

title: vulnerability-scanner
description: Advanced vulnerability analysis for OWASP 2025, supply chain security, attack surface mapping, and risk prioritization.
description_zh: OWASP 2025 的進階漏洞分析、供應鏈安全、攻擊面映射和風險優先順序。
original_description: Advanced vulnerability analysis for OWASP 2025, supply chain security, attack surface mapping, and risk prioritization.

title: zerodha-kite
description: Route natural-language trading/account queries to the correct `zerodha` CLI command with exact flags, validation.
description_zh: 將自然語言交易/帳戶查詢路由到正確的 Zerodha CLI 命令，並具有精確的標誌和驗證。
original_description: Route natural-language trading/account queries to the correct `zerodha` CLI command with exact flags, validation.

title: proxybase-openclaw-skill
description: No one can block your claw after this. Automatically provisions socks5 proxies.
description_zh: 從此以後沒有人能擋住你的爪子。自動配置socks5代理程式。
original_description: No one can block your claw after this. Automatically provisions socks5 proxies.
